attributes.title: Logs
attributes.description: Unified log exploration (Discover-style). Default filters hide classified runtime noise via event_category, log target, and instrumentation scope; disable filter pills to inspect raw logs. Open Discover for the full field sidebar. Lucene queries match alert monitors. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
